transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hello, this is Alex from DemoCompany calling about your DemoLender loan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You have an outstanding amount of forty two thousand rupees and should make a payment today.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: If you delay further, it may affect your credit profile.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You need to arrange payment immediately.
